name: The Founder's Speech to a Nation in Crisis
description: A self-published neoreactionary manifesto by Mencius Moldbug (Curtis Yarvin) that reframes US political history as regime changes, critiques democratic governance, and proposes CEO-monarchic alternatives through concepts like the Cathedral, disentanglement, and neo-cameralism.
author: Mencius Moldbug (Curtis Yarvin)
source: The Founder's Speech to a Nation in Crisis (self-published, 2019)
